mentions.note: Serial upside surpriser; Starbucks alternative; unique product (Annihilator); has actually given 3-day pop trades in past.
Good time to enter; expect very good numbers but high P/E warrants staged accumulation. Start position, don't buy all at once.
Stock unjustifiably sold off despite 29% year-over-year growth and CEO Christine Barone's strong execution; coffee beverage franchise model intact.
